title: Log out and block access to a protected page
description: A signed-in user can end the session and is redirected away from protected content when trying to revisit it.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Log out from the home page
Open a protected page from the home page
Verify the login page is shown
Verify protected content is not accessible

title: Log in and reach the home page
description: An existing user can sign in with valid credentials and is returned to the home page in a signed-in state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the user is signed in on the home page
Verify navigation links to protected areas are available

title: Protected pages redirect signed-out users to login
description: This test verifies that a logged-out user cannot open protected areas and is redirected to sign in instead.

steps.description: Navigate to /upload
Verify the user is redirected to the login page
Navigate to /my-memes
Verify the user is redirected to the login page
Navigate to /arena
Verify the user is redirected to the login page
Navigate to /leaderboard
Verify the user is redirected to the login page

title: New users can register and reach the home page
description: This test verifies that a new user can create an account and land on the authenticated home experience.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill in the display name field with a unique name
Fill in the email field with a unique email address
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the registration form
Verify the home page is displayed
Verify the signed-in status block is visible

title: Create a new account and reach the home page
description: A new user can register with valid details and is returned to the home page in a signed-in state.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill in the display name field with a new display name
Fill in the email field with a new email address
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Submit the registration form
Verify the user is signed in on the home page
Verify navigation links to protected areas are available

title: Users can log out and lose access to protected pages
description: This test verifies that a signed-in user can log out and is then prevented from opening protected areas.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /
Click the sign-out control
Navigate to /arena
Verify the user is redirected to the login page

title: Keep the signed-in state after reloading the home page
description: A returning signed-in user stays signed in after a browser reload and still sees protected navigation options.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Reload the page
Verify the user is still signed in on the home page
Verify navigation links to protected areas remain available

title: Signed-in users can reach protected pages from the home page
description: This test verifies that a returning signed-in user can access the protected areas through the home page navigation links.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /
Verify the signed-in status block is visible
Click the navigation link to upload a meme
Verify the upload page is displayed
Click the navigation link to view the user's memes
Verify the user's memes page is displayed
Click the navigation link to enter the arena
Verify the arena page is displayed
Click the navigation link to view the leaderboard
Verify the leaderboard page is displayed

title: Signed-in session survives a page reload
description: This test verifies that a logged-in user remains signed in after reloading the app.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /
Wait for the page to finish loading
Verify the signed-in status block is still visible

title: Signed-in session continues after token refresh
description: This test verifies that a returning signed-in user can continue using the app after the access token is refreshed during normal browsing.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /leaderboard
Wait for the page to finish loading
Verify the leaderboard page is displayed

title: Upload a meme with a title and see it in my memes
description: A signed-in user can upload a valid meme image with a title and then see it in their personal meme grid.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the upload page
Fill in the meme title field with a new title
Upload a valid meme image file
Submit the upload form
Open the my memes page
Verify the uploaded meme appears in the meme grid
Verify meme stats are displayed for the uploaded meme

title: Vote in the arena and see the next matchup
description: A signed-in user can choose a meme in the arena and then see the vote reveal and the next matchup appear.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the arena page
Vote for one of the memes in the matchup
Verify the vote is revealed
Verify the next matchup is displayed

title: Users can vote in the arena and see the next matchup
description: This test verifies that a user can cast a vote in the arena and the interface advances to the next battle after the reveal.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /arena
Select one meme in the current matchup using a click or arrow key
Verify the chosen meme is highlighted and the reveal is shown
Verify the next matchup is displayed

title: Vote for a meme in an arena matchup
description: This test verifies that a signed-in user can enter the arena, choose a winner in a head-to-head matchup, and see the selection reveal and advance to the next battle.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the arena link
Choose a meme in the current matchup
Verify the chosen meme is highlighted and the next matchup is displayed

title: Continue using the app after session refresh during normal use
description: A signed-in user can open a protected page after the session has been silently refreshed without being interrupted.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Wait for the session to refresh during normal use
Open a protected area from the home page
Verify the protected page is accessible
Verify the signed-in state remains available

title: Signed-in users can upload a meme and see it in their grid
description: This test verifies that a user can upload a valid meme image with a title and later find it in their personal meme grid.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /upload
Add a valid image file using the upload control
Fill in the title field with a unique meme title
Submit the upload form
Verify the upload completes and the user's memes page is displayed
Verify the uploaded meme appears in the user's meme grid

title: Vote in the arena using keyboard controls
description: This test verifies that a signed-in user can use the keyboard to select a matchup winner and continue to the next arena round.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the arena link
Press the left or right arrow key to choose a meme
Verify the selected meme is highlighted and the arena advances to the next matchup

title: Arena voting works with keyboard selection
description: This test verifies that a user can vote on an arena matchup using the keyboard and receive the normal post-vote progression.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /arena
Press an arrow key to choose a meme
Press Enter to submit the vote
Verify the selected meme is revealed as the winner or loser
Verify the arena advances to a new matchup

title: See arena ratings update after a vote
description: This test verifies that after voting in the arena, the reveal shows updated ratings and point changes for the matchup outcome.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the arena link
Choose a meme in the current matchup
Verify the reveal shows updated ratings and point change information

title: Vote in the arena using keyboard input
description: A signed-in user can cast an arena vote with the keyboard and see the same post-vote progression as a click vote.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the arena page
Press a voting arrow key
Verify the vote is revealed
Verify the next matchup is displayed

title: Leaderboard shows ranked memes and highlights the current user's entries
description: This test verifies that the leaderboard lists memes in rank order and visually marks the signed-in user's memes.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /leaderboard
Verify the ranked meme table is displayed
Verify the current user's memes are highlighted

title: View leaderboard rankings and meme details
description: This test verifies that the leaderboard shows memes ranked by rating and includes the expected row details for each entry.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the leaderboard link
Verify memes are ranked in descending order by rating and each row shows ranking details

title: View the ranked leaderboard and current-user highlighting
description: A signed-in user can open the leaderboard and see ranked memes with the current user's own memes highlighted.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the leaderboard page
Verify leaderboard rankings are displayed
Verify the current user's memes are highlighted

title: See leaderboard rows include all core meme stats
description: This test verifies that each leaderboard row shows the meme thumbnail, rating, wins, and losses alongside its rank and title.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the leaderboard link
Verify leaderboard rows include thumbnails, ratings, wins, and losses

title: Leaderboard displays the main ranking details for each meme
description: This test verifies that a signed-in user can inspect the leaderboard and see the core ranking information for listed memes.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /leaderboard
Verify ranking order is displayed
Verify meme details and ratings are displayed

title: See the current user's memes highlighted on the leaderboard
description: This test verifies that a signed-in user's own uploaded memes are visually distinguished on the leaderboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the leaderboard link
Verify the current user's memes are highlighted

title: Uploaded meme shows up in the user's grid with stats
description: This test verifies that the user can review uploaded memes and see the associated rating and win-loss information.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /my-memes
Verify the user's meme grid is displayed
Verify meme rating and win-loss stats are displayed

title: Users can delete one of their memes after confirming
description: This test verifies that a user can remove an owned meme from the grid after confirming the browser prompt.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /my-memes
Choose one owned meme to delete
Confirm the browser dialog
Verify the chosen meme is removed from the grid

title: Login rejects invalid credentials
description: This test verifies that an invalid sign-in attempt is rejected and the user remains on the login form.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with a fake email address
Fill in the password field with a fake password
Submit the login form
Verify a login validation error is visible
Verify the login form is still visible

title: Reject invalid login credentials
description: A user entering invalid credentials sees inline error feedback and remains unauthenticated.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with an unrecognized email address
Fill in the password field with an invalid password
Submit the login form
Verify an inline authentication error is visible
Verify the user is not signed in

title: Registration enforces a minimum password length
description: This test verifies that a new account cannot be created with a password that is too short.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill in the display name field with a unique name
Fill in the email field with a unique email address
Fill in the password field with a short password
Submit the registration form
Verify a password validation error is visible
Verify the registration form remains visible

title: Show the empty arena state when too few memes exist
description: A signed-in user sees an empty arena state when there are fewer than two memes available to battle.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the arena page
Verify an empty arena state is visible
Verify no matchup is available

title: Reject a too-short password during registration
description: A user cannot create an account when the password is shorter than the required minimum and sees inline validation feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill in the display name field with a new display name
Fill in the email field with a new email address
Fill in the password field with a password shorter than the minimum length
Submit the registration form
Verify a password validation error is visible
Verify the account is not created

title: See the arena empty state when not enough memes exist
description: This test verifies that the arena shows an empty state prompting the user to upload more memes when fewer than two memes are available.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the arena link
Verify an empty state message is displayed prompting the user to upload more memes

title: Block oversized meme uploads
description: A signed-in user sees validation feedback when trying to upload a file over the size limit and the upload does not complete.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the upload page
Fill in the meme title field with a new title
Upload a file larger than the allowed size
Submit the upload form
Verify a file size validation error is visible
Verify the meme is not added to the account

title: Upload enforces the maximum title length
description: This test verifies that the upload form blocks a meme title that exceeds the allowed length.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /upload
Add a valid image file using the upload control
Fill in the title field with a title that exceeds the maximum length
Submit the upload form
Verify a title validation error is visible
Verify the meme is not uploaded

title: Block unsupported files during meme upload
description: A signed-in user sees validation feedback when trying to upload a disallowed file type and the meme is not created.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the upload page
Fill in the meme title field with a new title
Upload a file with an unsupported type
Submit the upload form
Verify a file type validation error is visible
Verify the meme is not added to the account

title: Upload rejects a file with an unsupported type
description: This test verifies that the upload form blocks a non-image file and shows inline feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /upload
Add a file with a disallowed type using the upload control
Verify a file type validation error is visible
Verify the file is not accepted for upload

title: Upload rejects a file larger than the allowed size
description: This test verifies that the upload form blocks an oversized image and shows inline feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /upload
Add an image file larger than the allowed size using the upload control
Verify a file size validation error is visible
Verify the file is not accepted for upload

title: Enforce the title length limit during upload
description: A signed-in user cannot submit a meme title that exceeds the allowed length and sees inline validation feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the upload page
Fill in the meme title field with a title longer than the allowed maximum
Upload a valid meme image file
Submit the upload form
Verify a title validation error is visible
Verify the meme is not created
